name: Scratch
description: Scratches the opponent with sharp claws.

name: Tackle
description: Charges at the opponent with a full-body tackle.

name: Quick Attack
description: An extremely fast strike that always moves first.

name: Body Slam
description: Slams the full body into the opponent, potentially paralyzing them.

name: Hyper Beam
description: Fires a devastating beam of energy; must recharge next turn.

name: Growl
description: Lets out a cute growl to lower the opponent's Attack.

name: Double Team
description: Creates illusory copies to raise evasion.

name: Data Burst
description: Unleashes a burst of digital data at the opponent.

name: Pepper Flame
description: Spews a small but spicy flame at the opponent.

name: Fire Bomb
description: Hurls an explosive ball of fire at the opponent.

name: Nova Blast
description: Launches a superheated nova that may leave the opponent burned.

name: Giga Blaster
description: Fires an enormous blast of concentrated flame.

name: Crimson Flame
description: Engulfs the opponent in a fierce crimson inferno.

name: Wildfire
description: Spreads an uncontrolled blaze across the battlefield.

name: Marching Fishes
description: Summons a wave of fish to pelt the opponent.

name: Harpoon Torpedo
description: Launches a high-speed water torpedo at the opponent.

name: Tidal Wave
description: Crashes a massive wave down on the opponent.

name: Water Cannon
description: Fires a pressurized stream of water at the opponent.

name: Blue Blaster
description: Shoots a chilling blue beam of icy energy.

name: Ice Blast
description: Blasts the opponent with a wave of ice that may freeze them solid.

name: Howling Blaster
description: Unleashes a freezing howl that tears through the opponent.

name: Metal Wolf Claw
description: Slashes with ice-coated claws with tremendous force.

name: Poison Ivy
description: Lashes with toxic vines that may poison the opponent.

name: Thorn Whip
description: Strikes with a thorny whip that tears through foes.

name: Needle Spray
description: Sprays a barrage of sharp needles at the opponent.

name: Flower Cannon
description: Fires a massive burst of floral energy at the opponent.

name: Super Shocker
description: Zaps the opponent with a jolt of electric energy.

name: Thunder Bomb
description: Drops an explosive thunderbolt that may paralyze the opponent.

name: Electro Shocker
description: Delivers a powerful electric shock to the opponent.

name: Horn Buster
description: Channels lightning through a horn for a devastating electric blast.

name: Dragon Kick
description: Delivers a powerful kick infused with dragon energy.

name: Dragon Fire
description: Breathes a stream of draconic fire at the opponent.

name: Giga Slash
description: Delivers a massive slash imbued with overwhelming dragon power.

name: Metal Smash
description: Smashes the opponent with a steel-reinforced blow.

name: Iron Uppercut
description: Delivers a rising iron fist straight to the opponent.

name: Metal Cannon
description: Fires a dense projectile of compressed steel.

name: Boom Bubble
description: Releases an explosive bubble of holy energy.

name: Angel Rod
description: Strikes with a radiant rod of divine light.

name: Gate of Destiny
description: Opens a gate of holy power to unleash divine judgment.

name: Celestial Arrow
description: Fires a gleaming arrow forged from celestial light.

name: Excalibur
description: Cleaves with the legendary holy sword Excalibur.

name: Dark Spore
description: Releases a spore of dark energy that corrodes the opponent.

name: Death Claw
description: Rakes with shadowy claws that may cause the opponent to flinch.

name: Shadow Wing
description: Slices through the opponent with a wing of pure darkness.

name: Nightmare Claw
description: Tears at the opponent with claws born from nightmares.

name: Power Punch
description: Throws a straightforward punch with considerable force.

name: Bone Crusher
description: Delivers a crushing blow that can break bones.

name: Fist of Beast King
description: Strikes with the legendary fist of the beast king.

name: Volcanic Strike
description: Delivers a strike with the force of a volcanic eruption.

name: Spiral Twister
description: Spins a twisting vortex of air to hit the opponent.

name: Wing Blade
description: Slashes the opponent with razor-sharp wings.

name: Meteor Wing
description: Dives down from above like a meteor to strike the opponent.

name: Stinger
description: Jabs the opponent with a sharp insect stinger.

name: Spiking Strike
description: Attacks by driving sharp spikes into the opponent.

name: Bug Blitz
description: Charges at the opponent in a reckless bug-type rush.

name: Poison Needle
description: Stabs with a venomous needle that may poison the opponent.

name: Acid Spray
description: Sprays corrosive acid that may poison the opponent.

name: Venom Breath
description: Exhales a cloud of toxic venom with a high chance to poison.

name: Heal
description: Restores 50% of the user's maximum HP.

name: Barrier
description: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense.

name: Digivolve Burst
description: Taps into digivolution energy to raise Attack and Special Attack.

name: Quick Heal
description: Quickly restores 25% of the user's maximum HP, moving first.

name: Terra Fire
description: Concentrates fire energy and unleashes it. May burn.

name: Pyro Sphere
description: Fires a concentrated sphere of flames.

name: Blaze Blast
description: Blasts the foe with a burst of blazing fire.

name: Inferno Knuckle
description: Strikes with a fist wreathed in infernal flames.

name: Atomic Flame
description: Releases a torrent of nuclear-hot flames.

name: Magma Blast
description: Erupts with superheated magma from deep below.

name: Flame Inferno
description: Creates an unstoppable wall of fire.

name: Fire Tornado
description: Spins blazing fire into a devastating tornado.

name: Heat Wave
description: Exhales a wave of scorching hot air.

name: Fire Wall
description: Raises a wall of fire as a barrier.

name: Cocytus Breath
description: Breathes the chill of the frozen underworld.

name: Hydro Cannon
description: Fires a concentrated blast of high-pressure water.

name: Aqua Blaster
description: Blasts the foe with a stream of pressurized water.

name: Bubble Blow
description: Blows bubbles that may slow the foe.

name: Water Bomb
description: Detonates a concentrated ball of water.

name: Ice Arrow
description: Fires shards of ice with pinpoint accuracy.

name: Surf
description: Rides a powerful wave across the battlefield.

name: Whirlpool
description: Traps the foe in a violent whirlpool.

name: Diamond Storm
description: Launches razor-sharp shards of ice like diamonds.

name: Blizzard Breath
description: Exhales a blizzard that freezes everything.

name: Arctic Blast
description: Unleashes a devastating blast of arctic air.

name: Tundra Freeze
description: Freezes the ground and erupts in an ice column.

name: Sub-Zero Ice
description: Plunges the foe into sub-zero temperatures.

name: Cold Breath
description: Breathes cold air that always slows the foe.

name: Thunder Strike
description: Calls down a devastating lightning strike.

name: Static Force
description: Surrounds the foe in crackling static electricity.

name: Plasma Sphere
description: Fires a sphere of pure plasma energy.

name: Lightning Blade
description: Charges the blade with lightning for a rapid strike.

name: Mega Shocker
description: Releases an enormous electric shockwave.

name: Bolt Drive
description: Dashes forward with the speed of lightning.

name: Electro Bolts
description: Fires multiple small bolts of electricity.

name: Lightning Spear
description: Hurls a spear made of pure lightning.

name: Leaf Storm
description: Whips up a fierce storm of razor-sharp leaves.

name: Vine Whip
description: Strikes quickly with thorny vines.

name: Spore Cloud
description: Releases a cloud of sleep-inducing spores.

name: Solar Blast
description: Concentrates solar energy into a powerful beam.

name: Petal Blizzard
description: Unleashes a flurry of razor-sharp flower petals.

name: Root Bind
description: Binds the foe with grasping roots.

name: Nature Force
description: Channels nature's power into an attack.

name: Thorn Shot
description: Fires sharp thorns with poisonous tips.

name: Dramon Killer
description: A claw technique especially effective against Dramon.

name: Terra Destroyer
description: Compresses the atmosphere into a giant dark sphere.

name: Draco Meteor
description: Summons meteors of draconic energy from the sky.

name: Dragon Roar
description: Unleashes a powerful roar of dragon energy.

name: Dragon Claw
description: Slashes with razor-sharp dragon claws.

name: Dragon Crusher
description: Crushes the foe with overwhelming dragon power.

name: Dragon Breath
description: Exhales draconic breath that may slow the foe.

name: Infinity Cannon
description: Fires a devastating cannon with infinite energy.

name: Atomic Blaster
description: Unleashes atomic-level energy in a focused beam.

name: Giga Crusher
description: Crushes with an enormous mechanical force.

name: Metal Fang
description: Bites with metallic jaws.

name: Laser Shot
description: Fires a pinpoint laser beam.

name: Iron Fist
description: Strikes with an iron-hard fist.

name: Chrome Digizoid
description: Coats itself in chrome digizoid for defense.

name: Beam Cannon
description: Fires a concentrated energy beam from a built-in cannon.

name: Rivet Hammer
description: Swings a massive metal hammer.

name: Shining Blast
description: Fires a blinding beam of holy light.

name: Divine Tornado
description: Creates a holy whirlwind of divine energy.

name: Seven Heavens
description: Calls down seven spheres of holy light from above.

name: Star Light Explosion
description: Releases an explosion of concentrated starlight.

name: Heaven's Gate
description: Opens the gates of heaven to unleash holy judgment.

name: Holy Flame
description: Unleashes purifying holy flames.

name: Sacred Arrow
description: Fires an arrow of sacred energy at high speed.

name: Holy Claw
description: Slashes with claws imbued with holy power.

name: God Typhoon
description: Summons a typhoon of divine energy.

name: Holy Heal
description: Restores half HP with holy power.

name: Chaos Flare
description: Unleashes a torrent of chaotic dark energy.

name: Grisly Wing
description: Sends a swarm of dark creatures at the foe.

name: Nightmare Syndrome
description: Drags the foe into a nightmare dimension.

name: Shadow Saber
description: Strikes with a blade of pure shadow.

name: Death Slinger
description: Fires dark energy shots rapidly.

name: Crimson Lightning
description: Launches a bolt of crimson dark lightning.

name: Soul Crusher
description: Crushes the foe's spirit with overwhelming dark power.

name: Dark Crush
description: Crushes the foe with darkness-empowered force.

name: Night Raid
description: Strikes suddenly from the shadows.

name: Justice Knuckle
description: Strikes with the power of absolute justice.

name: Lion King
description: Attacks with the ferocity of a king of beasts.

name: Tiger Wing Blades
description: Slashes with tiger-swift blade techniques.

name: Beat Knuckle
description: Strikes repeatedly with rapid-fire punches.

name: Rapid Kick
description: Delivers a flurry of rapid kicks.

name: Crushing Blow
description: An overwhelming strike that can break defenses.

name: Hurricane Kick
description: Delivers spinning kicks with tornado force.

name: Force Claw
description: Rakes the foe with force-amplified claws.

name: Seismic Toss
description: Grabs the foe and slams it into the ground.

name: Wind Scythe
description: Slashes with blades of compressed wind.

name: Sonic Boom
description: Sends a shockwave powerful enough to flinch foes.

name: Hurricane Force
description: Summons a devastating hurricane wind.

name: Condor Wind
description: Unleashes wind with condor-like force.

name: Sky Slash
description: Dives from the sky with a slashing attack.

name: Talon Strike
description: Rakes with razor-sharp talons.

name: Feather Slash
description: Slices with blade-like feathers.

name: Wing Gust
description: Flaps wings to create a slowing gust.

name: Aerial Dive
description: Dives at the foe from extreme altitude.

name: Mantis Blade
description: Slashes with blades as sharp as a mantis's arm.

name: Wasp Sting
description: Stings with a venomous wasp-like stinger.

name: Larva Burst
description: Sprays corrosive larval fluid.

name: Luring Net
description: Ensnares the foe in a sticky web.

name: Cocoon Armor
description: Wraps itself in a protective cocoon shell.

name: Bug Rush
description: Rushes forward with overwhelming bug energy.

name: Toxic Mist
description: Releases a toxic mist that always poisons.

name: Corrosive Acid
description: Sprays powerful acid that corrodes armor.

name: Miasma Breath
description: Exhales a cloud of toxic miasma.

name: Bio Slime
description: Throws a glob of toxic biological slime.

name: Infection Breath
description: Breathes out a powerful infectious wave.

name: Venom Spit
description: Spits venom at the foe.

name: Digi Beam
description: Fires a beam of concentrated digidata.

name: Data Drain
description: Drains the target's data to attack.

name: Ultimate Charge
description: Charges power for an ultimate strike.

name: Taunt
description: Taunts the foe, forcing it to use only damaging moves.

name: Roar
description: Lets out a terrifying roar that unnerves the foe.
